outcome_evidence: Post-commit inspection of git log in opt-chore-1782680083 revealed commits 55c101c, c2f0c8d, aafa5ba (same gitignore fix) already present from prior agent runs. opt-skills-1782670300 also has 4 commits doing identical work (fa20e9f, 3674afd, 086dd08, fa6f030). This exact task has been done ≥5 times across 2 worktrees but never merged to main. Root cause: scout-scan sees untracked files in main workspace (gitignore only applied in worktrees, not main), so each agent run rediscovers it.
next_suggestion: Human action required: merge one pending worktree (opt-skills-1782670300 or opt-chore-1782680083) that has the skills gitignore fix, then reject the other. Until merged, autonomous agents will keep rediscovering and re-doing this same fix. Alternatively, fix the skills main workspace directly (apply gitignore without worktree) so scout-scan stops flagging it.
